recommendations.title: CODA
recommendations.overview: As a CODA (Child of Deaf Adults), Ruby is the only hearing person in her deaf family. When the family's fishing business is threatened, Ruby finds herself torn between pursuing her love of music and her fear of abandoning her parents.

recommendations.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
recommendations.overview: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

recommendations.title: Heavy Trip
recommendations.overview: Turo is stuck in a small village and the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. He and his bandmates have practiced for 12 years without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from

recommendations.title: Metal: A Headbanger's Journey
recommendations.overview: The film discusses the traits and originators of some of metal's many subgenres, including the New Wave of British Heavy Metal, power metal, Nu metal, glam metal, thrash metal, black metal, and death metal. Dunn uses a family-tree-type flowchart to d
recommendations.director: Jessica Joy Wise, Scot McFadyen, Sam Dunn

recommendations.title: Whiplash
recommendations.overview: Under the direction of a ruthless instructor, a talented young drummer begins to pursue perfection at any cost, even his humanity.

recommendations.title: To the Bone
recommendations.overview: A young woman dealing with anorexia meets an unconventional doctor who challenges her to face her condition and embrace life.

recommendations.title: Metalhead
recommendations.overview: A young girl in 1990s Iceland is caught between the life that took her brother and her own inability to strike out on her own. In her grief, she finds solace in metal and dreams of making her own music.

recommendations.title: I Used to Be Famous
recommendations.overview: A former boy band star unexpectedly gets a second shot at success when he forms a bond with a gifted young drummer.

recommendations.title: Barbara

recommendations.title: Ex Drummer
